patient_summary:
• 73/F patient
• Primary Dx: Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus
• Key Procedures: Ancillary Procedure (LGH KISSEL HILL)
• Active Meds: 1 medications including Atorvastatin
• Allergies: NKDA
• Critical Labs: Glucose 199 H; GFR 50 A; HDL 38 L
• Key History: Former smoker
